value.command: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/contracts-command.spec.ts tests/unit/health-command.spec.ts tests/unit/plan-command.spec.ts tests/unit/validate-command.spec.ts

value.author: codex-sdk-cli-continuation
value.text: Evidence: Implemented PR #200 review hardening. Fixed health locks scan to fail open with a warn check when lock scanning throws; exposed docs --list in command contracts and strict MCP action schema; added SDK list parameter metadata; bumped strict tool schema version to 4.0.3; added reusable oneOfRequired and dependentAnyOfRequired schema generation; made history-repair require exactly one of id/all and require all=true for bulk; made files/docs addNote require add/addGlob; made validate prune batching use a typed path filter; made stale linked path basename matching handle Windows separators; made plan step normalization tolerate nullish/non-string MCP-style inputs. Verification passed: pnpm build; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/contracts-command.spec.ts tests/unit/health-command.spec.ts tests/unit/plan-command.spec.ts tests/unit/validate-command.spec.ts (165 tests); pnpm contracts:check; pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift (history drift ok, existing resolution warning backlog remains); pnpm changelog:pm:check; pnpm quality:static; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (150 files, 2802 tests, enforced gate passed; aggregate coverage 82.81% lines, not literal full-source 100%); pnpm security:scan; pnpm audit --audit-level low; pnpm smoke:npx; node scripts/release/sentry-telemetry-gate.mjs --json --telemetry-mode required --max-critical 10 --max-high 20 --max-telemetry-error-rate 10 --max-telemetry-missing-error-rows 0 (Sentry checked ok, 0 critical, 0 high, telemetry ok, finish error rate 1.49%, missing error-code rows 0); manual temp smoke with isolated PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH covering init/create/docs add/docs list/plan create/health/validate.

patch.value: Closed PR #200 review hardening follow-up after implementing bot feedback, adding focused regressions, regenerating contracts, and passing build/tests/contracts/coverage/security/audit/temp-smoke/Sentry telemetry gates.
PR #200 bot review findings are fixed with regression coverage and regenerated contracts
Health locks scan fails open, MCP schemas are stricter/current, defensive input fixes are covered, and gates/temp smoke/Sentry telemetry passed
